name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes inaccuracies in financial reporting. We automate expense report generation instead of manual expense tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual tracking of expenses leads to inaccuracies and time loss.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual tracking of expenses leads to inaccuracies and time loss.
